name: vehicles-create
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (path-3; NOT assassin-enumerated). STATE-backed per-user garage (globalThis._concordSTATE.automotiveLens.vehicles, keyed by ctx.actor.userId). Requires a non-empty name (fail-CLOSED on blank). odometer is clamped to Math.max(0, Number||0) so a poisoned '1e999'→Infinity→Number||0 collapses to 0 — never a negative or NaN odometer. odometerUnit/fuelUnit fall back to mi/gal on garbage. Sequence number V-NNN auto-increments per user. Degrade-graceful: returns {ok:false,error:'STATE unavailable'} when STATE absent — never throws. Pinned by server/tests/automotive-lens-macros.test.js.
